title: Testimonials | Green Card Lawyer | Houston & Austin, TX | Foster LLP
content:
## See What Previous Clients Think of Our Immigration Law Firm
Feedback is critical to the legal team at Foster LLP. Constructive feedback of our global immigration services sheds light on the areas clients believe we can improve upon. It also gives potential clients the confidence they need to believe our firm has their best interests at heart.

### We invite you to help us grow as a company and as your preferred immigration provider by completing a short survey below:
Curious to learn more about what our immigration law firm can do for you? Check out our testimonials on Google , Yelp , and Lawyers.com , or reach out to us to today to schedule a consultation. Whether you’ve worked with us in the past and enjoyed your experience, or believe there is something we can improve upon, we would love to hear from you.
If you are interested in our US & global immigration services, please set up a consultation with one of our immigration lawyers today. With principal offices located in Houston , Austin , and Dallas, TX, we’ve worked with clients throughout the state of Texas and across the globe.
“As an HR practitioner in a multi-national company, it is essential that I have a strategic dependable partner with immigration. [Foster LLP] has provided consistently reliable, insightful services to guide our organization through many complex scenarios. With their expertise, we have been able to navigate through localization and also transfer many employees from our corporate headquarters in Europe. I am grateful for the care and high level of detail they provide. Thank you Foster [Global]!”
– Ashley I., Talent Specialist, Ferrovial Services
“It is with great pleasure that I recommend the immigration legal services of Foster Global. I have worked with this group for over 17 years and have never been disappointed. We have relied on the Foster team for their expertise and guidance in immigration matters. I’ve had many impromptu visits from CIS over the years and have always felt confident that our records are in order and matters have been handled appropriately and above reproach. Anyone considering utilizing their services will not be disappointed.”
– Senior HR Manager, Automotive industry
“It’s so refreshing to work with a team that makes my job so much easier. In the relocation industry, it’s hard to find suppliers that I know will do a wonderful job.”
– Krista C., Mobility Manager, Engineering services company
“I found Foster Global to be a huge help to my Visa issues and overall very knowledgeable on all fronts. They were integral in getting my Visa sorted in a quick and efficient process.”
– Calum, Manager, Braemar
“[Foster] was consistently professional, utterly thorough and clearly possessed [a] very deep knowledge of expertise. [As] a senior lawyer licensed in multiple jurisdictions, I know a superior lawyer when I work with one.”
“Great experience, the result of the process was positive. Very professional and knowledgeable staff.”
– R. Ramirez, Manufacturing Engineer
“Great and efficient service. The attorneys at Foster LLP are some of the top immigration attorneys. I appreciate all their help through such a lengthy and worrying process.”
“We had a great experience working with Foster in my green card process. The attorney assigned to our case was very kind, explaining every detail and gave us the confidence we needed to get it done.”
“My family and I had the best experience with Foster. The attorney assigned to our case was very informative, patient, and had great communications skills. Most of all, she was passionate about what she does. We are all very grateful!”
“Associating with Team Foster for our recent immigration need was a decision which left us as a delighted loyal client. They were on guard of the timelines; We were carefree and relaxed. It was a seamless process, where we were rightly guided and well taken care of from A to Z. Thank you!”
- Awards & Recognition
- Community Service & Advocacy
